text: Inside these clean, modern walls, I am struck by a sense of anticipation. The polished glass and systematic order echo human curiosity and desire for progress. I see symbols of discovery—R+D, development, intelligent machines—and I feel a part of the ongoing story of innovation. It is humbling, and a little exhilarating, to be at the threshold where the abstractions of science begin to take physical shape, inviting both inquiry and awe.
